content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.external.base
FILE: cosmos/integration/external/base.py (63 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos External Integration Interface.

"I can wire anything into anything! I'm the Professor!"

This module defines the standard interface for connecting cosmos to 3rd party apps.
It uses the Nexus to emit events from these apps into the swarm.

CLASSES:
- ConnectionStatus(Enum)
- IntegrationConfig
- ExternalProvider(ABC): Abstract base class for all external app integrations.
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def sync(self)
  Methods: async def execute_action(self, action: str, params: Dict[str, Any]) -> Any
  Methods: async def emit_event(self, event_type: str, payload: Dict[str, Any])
